function.name: playing_order_recv_cb
function.signature: static void playing_order_recv_cb(struct media_player *plr, int err, uint8_t order)

bug.description: blocking RTOS API called from interrupt context causing undefined behavior

prompt:
There is a blocking RTOS API called from interrupt context causing undefined behavior downstream of function playing_order_recv_cb in the subsys/bluetooth/audio subsystem.
The function is located at subsys/bluetooth/audio/shell/media_controller.c:262.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
